Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

Running Vedabase on Parallels

Tech · asked by user [] · 2009-10-14 · 2 answers
Hare Krishna dear devotees,
I am using the latest version of Parallels on my Mac OS 10.5.8. I installed XP on my virtual machine then tried installing Vedabase on XP with no success. Everytime I start the installation XP crashes.
I read a comment from Mishra saying that he has no problem running parallels with Vedabase. Please could any kind soul enlighten me as to what I need to do.

Your servant

Sundar
user [2] · 2009-10-14
Vedabase runned well when I had it. Now windows is gone for good from my system altogether, so I do not know if could be a problem with MacOSX software updates affecting the ability to run Vedabase.
I am using a generic search on vedabase.net when I need to find something in Srila Prabhupada'b4s books like this: site: vedabase.net yoursearchwords
If you wanna try other things look at Crossover http://www.codeweavers.com, or try and install windows 7 in another virtual machine.
user [455] · 2009-10-15
ok, thanks prabhuji

your servant

Sundar
